displayName: New Zealand – Partner of a New Zealander Visa
shortDescription: Immigration NZ · Partnership visa · Cultural marriage evidence · Living together

policyAlert.summary: Confirm current Partnership visa fee (NZD $1,670 approx) on immigration.govt.nz before quoting.

alert.title: Genuine and stable partnership
alert.body: INZ assesses whether relationship is genuine, stable, and of minimum duration. Weak evidence is leading refusal factor.

about.label: Description
about.value: Residence visa for partner of New Zealand citizen or resident in genuine and stable relationship. Includes cultural marriage recognition for Indian applicants where applicable.

about.label: Eligible applicants
about.value: Genuine stable partnership 12+ months living together (or other qualifying criteria) · NZ citizen/resident partner · Health and character · Relationship evidence

about.label: Living together evidence
about.value: Must demonstrate 12+ months cohabitation or meet alternative INZ criteria for cultural marriage or long-distance relationships.

about.label: After approval
about.value: Residence visa conditions; pathway to permanent residence per INZ rules.

redFlagsBanner: If refused on partnership grounds, rebuild evidence chronology before reapplication.

redFlags.title: Insufficient cohabitation evidence
redFlags.fix: Joint lease, bills, photos with dates, affidavits

redFlags.title: Weak relationship timeline
redFlags.description: Few photos, no communication history, recent relationship.
redFlags.fix: Chronological narrative; visit records; family statements

redFlags.title: Partner eligibility unclear
redFlags.description: Partner visa status or citizenship not verified.
redFlags.fix: Verify NZ partner status before apply

redFlags.title: Cultural marriage without support
redFlags.description: Arranged marriage with weak pre/post marriage evidence.
redFlags.fix: Pre-marriage communication; ceremony photos; family affidavits

faqs.a: No. INZ assesses relationship genuineness individually.
Generally required; some exceptions for long-distance or cultural marriages—verify INZ criteria.
Residence visa typically allows work—verify grant conditions.
Yes if legally registered with certified translation.

faqs.q: What if partner is NZ citizen abroad?
faqs.a: Assess whether application from inside or outside NZ.
Yes for residence applications—INZ panel physicians.

compliance: Client service agreement and consent must be on file before submission
Never guarantee visa or immigration approval; use approved-language only
Fee quotes must separate consultancy, government, and third-party costs
proTips: Build relationship timeline from first meeting
For arranged marriages include pre-marriage communication
postApproval: Guide on IRD/tax registration if applicable

relatedServices.label: New Zealand – Post Study Work Visa

changelog.author: Service Library
changelog.summary: Initial NZ partnership visa counselor content.

staffNotes.author: Documentation team
staffNotes.text: Long-distance partnerships need extra INZ criteria check—do not assume 12-month cohabitation rule applies without verification.

dos: Include cultural marriage support docs if applicable
donts: Do not apply without cohabitation evidence

sampleDocs.title: Sample passport bio page (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Show clients which pages to scan — MRZ visible, no glare, full spread.

sampleDocs.title: Sample marriage certificate (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Registered marriage proof — explain translation and notarization if needed.

sampleDocs.title: Sample relationship timeline & photos guide (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Collage layout for chat logs, travel photos, and ceremony pictures.

sampleDocs.title: Sample sponsor / undertaking letter (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Sponsor income, accommodation, and maintenance commitment.

sampleDocs.title: Sample bank statement (mock)
sampleDocs.description: 6-month statement with name, account number, and closing balance — explain seasoning.

sampleDocs.title: Sample chat / communication evidence (mock)
sampleDocs.description: Redacted WhatsApp or email excerpts — privacy-safe specimen.
